title: Proving Energy-Momentum Tensor Lorentz Invariance
desc: Demonstrates the Lorentz tensor property of T^αβ and transforms particle motion equations between coordinate systems.

title: Gravitational Waves: Linear Approximation Analysis
desc: Explains gravitational waves using linearized Einstein equations, metric perturbations, and first-order approximations.
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework: Harmonic Oscillator and Double Pendulum
desc: Explores momentum-space Lagrangian for harmonic oscillator and Hamiltonian analysis of double pendulum with small-angle approximation.

title: Proving Canonical Transformations in Analytical Mechanics
desc: A homework set demonstrating proofs of canonical transformations using generating functions for various coordinate systems.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Solutions for canonical transformations and Poisson brackets in analytical mechanics problems.

title: Canonical Transformations in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Analyzes canonical transformations for anharmonic oscillators and action-angle variables in a tan² potential.

title: Lagrangian Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Solutions for three physics problems using Lagrangian equations, covering spring-mass systems, inclined planes, and conical motion.

title: Variational Calculus in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Applying functional variation to prove geodesics on spheres, minimal surfaces of revolution, and catenary curves under gravity.

title: Light Path in Exponential Atmosphere via Calculus of Variations
desc: Derives the trajectory of sunlight through an exponentially stratified atmosphere using variational principles and the Euler-Lagrange equation.

title: Central Force Problems in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Solving two central force problems: finding force for an Archimedean spiral trajectory and determining motion under inverse-cube gravity.
